---
title: "Toni Idowu"
output:
  html_document:
    css: styles.css
---

<div class="profile-section">
<img src="picture.png" class="profile-pic" alt="Toni Idowu">
<div class="profile-text">

## Welcome!

I am a recent MPH graduate in Epidemiology from Emory University with a Certificate in Data Science. My work focuses on analyzing health data to generate insights that inform programs, guide decisions, and improve community outcomes. Skilled in R, SAS, and Excel, I am actively seeking data analyst, epidemiologist, or analytics-focused roles where I can bridge technical skills and public health knowledge.

**Email:** tonicharity6@gmail.com  
**Location:** Atlanta, GA

</div>
</div>
